title: rosa × centifolia var. pomponia
intro: Rosa × centifolia var. pomponia, also known as the rose pompon, is a type of fragrant, flowering plant belonging to the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The rose pompon is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting better sleep. Rosa × centifolia var. pomponia can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
